productDisplayName: Fila Men Regulator Black Sports Shoes
description: Style noteCrafted from Italy's materials capital Biella, this fila shoe promises a smooth ride and optimal durability. fila fanboys know the comfort that this brand provides - do you need more reasons to buy the Fila DLS RegulatorProduct DetailsRound toed black and grey shoe with mesh overlays and central lace-upsPadded inner, tongue and collarFoamy rubber midsole that is raised at the outsoleAggressive TPU outsole with a decoupled heel and multidirectional lugsMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
